project.title: Hyatt Global — Cross-Cloud DR & HA
project.excerpt: Sub-10 minute RTO across AWS and Azure cloud regions.
project.content: Architected and led a comprehensive Snowflake Cross-Cloud Disaster Recovery and High Availability strategy for Hyatt Global, implementing Failover Groups and Client Redirect to ensure sub-10 minute RTO and seamless application failover across DEV, UAT, and PROD environments. Simultaneously designed a secure Reltio-Snowflake integration using Key-Pair Authentication and PrivateLink for private data transit off the public internet.

project.title: Hyatt Global — Enterprise IAM & RBAC
project.content: Led the enterprise-wide Snowflake Identity and Access Management initiative, partnering with the Azure SSO team to architect a zero-trust framework from scratch, including complex role mapping and SAML-based authentication. Designed 2200+ property-level roles enabling secure, granular access to the semantic layer for Hyatt's global business units. Implemented a Data Mesh-inspired approach to property-level access ensuring scalable data sharing while maintaining strict HIPAA and GDPR compliance.

project.title: Streamlit Governance App
project.content: Developed a custom Streamlit governance application featuring 29 distinct monitoring features, providing real-time visibility and automated alerting for privileged user activities and security compliance — delivered within a 2-week sprint at Hyatt Global. Also developed automated financial dashboards and KPI tracking for cloud spend, performing rate variance analysis and budget oversight across Snowflake environments.
